evidence_inventory.title: Crisis Exists

core_papers.title: AI models collapse when trained on recursively generated data
core_papers.role: Establishes empirical foundation of model collapse

core_papers.title: Self-Consuming Generative Models go MAD
core_papers.role: Provides theoretical framework for autophagous loops

core_papers.title: Self-Correcting Self-Consuming Loops for Generative Model Training
core_papers.role: Demonstrates self-correction mechanisms and their limits
core_papers.key_finding: Self-correction can stabilize but not prevent collapse

core_papers.title: SIGMA: Scalable Spectral Insights for LLM Collapse
core_papers.role: Provides mathematical proof via spectral analysis

core_papers.title: Universality of the π²/6 Pathway in Avoiding Model Collapse
core_papers.role: Shows mathematical universality of collapse patterns
core_papers.key_finding: π²/6 constant appears across all model types

evidence_inventory.narrative: Model collapse was first demonstrated empirically (475 citations), then theoretically formalized as MAD. Self-correction attempts show limited success. Spectral analysis provides mathematical proof, while universality studies show this affects all model types equally.
remaining_gaps: Missing Shumailov et al. 2023 Nature paper
No quantification of current web pollution levels
Need Alemohammad et al. 2024 for completeness

evidence_inventory.title: Empirical Decline

core_papers.title: Degradation of Language Models through Recursive Training
core_papers.role: Shows empirical quality decline in production models

core_papers.title: LLMs Can Get "Brain Rot"!
core_papers.key_finding: Continual exposure to poor data causes permanent degradation

core_papers.title: ChatGPT is incredible (at being average)
core_papers.key_finding: Statistical convergence to mediocrity in responses

core_papers.title: [MISSING] Web Quality Temporal Analysis
core_papers.role: Would show temporal degradation of web content
core_papers.key_finding: Critical gap - no longitudinal studies available

evidence_inventory.narrative: While we have evidence of model quality degradation and homogenization effects, the critical temporal analysis of web quality decline is missing. Current papers show symptoms but not the longitudinal progression.
remaining_gaps: Liang et al. 2024 on web quality decline
Penedo et al. 2023 Common Crawl analysis

evidence_inventory.title: Theory Framework

core_papers.title: Divergences for measuring model collapse
core_papers.role: Provides mathematical tools for measuring collapse
core_papers.key_finding: KL divergence tracks information loss precisely

evidence_inventory.narrative: Theory exists but lacks foundation. We have tools for measuring collapse and authenticity loss, but missing fundamental information theory connections that would validate the L_auth formula.

evidence_inventory.title: Validation Studies

core_papers.title: The Value of Non-Professional Human Data
What You Say Is What You Teach LLMs
core_papers.role: Shows direct impact of training data quality
core_papers.key_finding: Training data quality directly predicts performance

core_papers.title: Comparative Analysis of Decentralized Training Paradigms

evidence_inventory.narrative: Recent papers show human data value and decentralized benefits, but lack validation on established benchmarks. The evidence is promising but unproven at scale.

evidence_inventory.title: Solution Design

core_papers.title: Social-First Approaches to AI Data Collection
The Future of Mobile Internet with AI Integration
core_papers.key_finding: Mobile platforms ideal for authentic data

core_papers.title: [MISSING] CampusGo-style Implementations
core_papers.key_finding: Campus platforms as proof of concept

evidence_inventory.narrative: Solution concepts exist but lack concrete implementation frameworks. The gap between vision and executable design remains unbridged.
